description: Seed patterns for the audit/parser-state-machine family. Hits target state enums, transition tables, parser entry points, framing / chunking logic, and lifecycle hooks. The skill's job is to verify each transition is explicitly handled, errors don't leave the state ambiguous, and partial-state reads don't return data.
notes: State machines often span multiple files: an enum definition, a transition table, and a dispatcher. The skill should follow each.
The highest-value findings here are: states that accept partial data, error paths that don't revert, parse-after-disconnect, frame boundary errors.
Static analysis is necessary but rarely sufficient. The skill should explicitly note when fuzzing / differential testing would be needed.

c_cpp.false_positive_notes: May also match unrelated enums; check the enum members.

c_cpp.description: switch on a state variable — transition dispatcher
c_cpp.false_positive_notes: High signal when paired with state_definition hits.

c_cpp.description: Case label for a state constant
c_cpp.false_positive_notes: Naming convention; misses states with different naming.

c_cpp.description: Parser entry points and HTTP parser callbacks
c_cpp.false_positive_notes: Stable; matches http-parser library and idiomatic names.
Very common; useful for proximity / file-density signal.

c_cpp.description: Short-read / EOF check on a read syscall — partial-state risk
c_cpp.false_positive_notes: Many reads are length-bounded; the question is what state the parser leaves behind.

javascript_typescript.false_positive_notes: Common in stateful UI; check for parser context.
Stream classes always have these; check what's parsed.

python.description: ElementTree / iterparse / XMLPullParser — streaming XML state machine. Audit XXE (defusedxml preferred).
python.false_positive_notes: Plain xml.etree is vulnerable to XXE; defusedxml.ElementTree is the safe alternative.

python.description: json.JSONDecoder with custom object_hook — code path triggered per nested object, edge cases (depth, recursion) need audit
python.false_positive_notes: Custom object_hook is the audit-relevant variant.

python.description: html.parser SAX-style callbacks — event-driven HTML state machine
python.false_positive_notes: Stable. Audit unclosed-tag handling, malformed entities.

python.description: Python email parser — RFC 5322 state machine, header folding/encoding edge cases
python.false_positive_notes: Audit header injection from user-supplied addresses.

python.description: asyncio Protocol — low-level transport state machine (TCP/UDP/SSL)
python.false_positive_notes: Audit eof_received vs connection_lost handling, partial-buffer state.

java.description: Java enum state / phase / status declarations — the type the dispatcher switches on
java.false_positive_notes: Matches non-FSM status enums too; high-value when followed by switch hits in the same file.

java.description: switch on a state/phase/status field — transition dispatcher
java.false_positive_notes: Stable; targets idiomatic FSM dispatchers in HTTP/AJP/HTTP2 parsers.

java.description: State assignment to an enum constant — transition edge
java.false_positive_notes: Skips simple int assignments; targets `state = State.READING` form.

java.description: Tomcat HTTP/1.1, AJP, HTTP/2 parser classes
java.false_positive_notes: Very specific to Tomcat / catalina; near-zero FP.

java.description: Jetty HttpParser entry points and state enum references
Netty channel decoders — stateful frame parsers
SAX handler methods — state-tracking XML parsing
StAX (XML streaming) — explicit state transitions per event
Spring State Machine / squirrel-foundation / similar FSM libs
Short-read / EOF check on a channel — partial-state risk in a parser
java.false_positive_notes: Many reads are length-bounded; the question is whether the parser state is properly rewound on EOF.
Catches explicit table-driven FSMs; misses inline-coded ones.

csharp.false_positive_notes: Common; high-value paired with switch on state.

kotlin.description: Kotlin sealed class for FSM — idiomatic state representation
when expression on a state variable — FSM dispatcher

php.description: ESI directive tag — Edge Side Include parser entry. Historical CVE-2015-2308 PHP code injection via <script language="php"> inside ESI body.
php.false_positive_notes: Real ESI tags only appear in test fixtures, response bodies, or templates. Hits in test/ are likely fixture data.

php.description: Symfony ESI processor / renderer instantiation — surrogate state machine entry
php.false_positive_notes: May match Esi-named utilities in other contexts; correlate with esi-include-tag.

php.description: Server-Side Include directive — Apache/Symfony SSI parser entry
php.false_positive_notes: Rare in modern stacks. Hits indicate active SSI processing — high security relevance.

php.description: HInclude tag or renderer — async client-side fragment include with server-side state
Symfony fragment subsystem — chain of render() calls forming a state pipeline
php.false_positive_notes: High signal in Symfony repos. Skill should trace render() to detect untrusted URIs.

php.description: Surrogate interface — base for ESI/SSI processors. Custom implementors are high-risk parser code.
Symfony HttpCache reverse-proxy state methods (RFC 7234 freshness / revalidation / forward / store transitions)
php.false_positive_notes: ->store and ->fetch are common method names elsewhere; correlate with HttpCache class context.

php.description: Cache-Control directive in headers — drives cache state transitions
php.false_positive_notes: Common in docs / comments. Useful as density signal in cache layers.

php.description: Conditional / cache validator headers — drive 304 Not Modified state transitions
php.false_positive_notes: Header strings appear in many string literals; useful as density signal in HTTP cache code.

php.description: Symfony URI signing / signature validation — stateful HMAC verification (CVE-2015-4050-class auth bypass surface)
php.false_positive_notes: Stable Symfony marker. Signature mismatch handling is the key code path to audit.

php.description: PHP session lifecycle transitions (start/regenerate/close/destroy/migrate) — state machine of session validity
php.false_positive_notes: Stable PHP/Symfony API; high signal for session fixation / regenerate-on-auth audit.

php.description: Symfony controller/argument resolution chain — request lifecycle state
php.false_positive_notes: ->getController and ->resolve are generic names; correlate with Symfony imports.

php.description: Symfony event dispatcher — orders the request/response state machine via prioritised listeners
php.false_positive_notes: Very common in Symfony. Useful as density signal; deeper relevance in BeforeListener / AfterListener pairs.

ruby.description: Nokogiri SAX parser — event-driven XML, audit nesting depth + external entity handling
ruby.false_positive_notes: Stable Nokogiri marker. Audit XXE risks (Nokogiri::XML::ParseOptions::NOENT).

ruby.description: Streaming JSON parser — chunked-input state machine. Some libraries differ on what's safe to deserialize.
ruby.false_positive_notes: JSON.load vs JSON.parse: load deserializes objects (RCE risk), parse only primitives.

ruby.description: IO non-blocking wait conditions — short read / partial state handling
Ruby state-machines / AASM gem — declarative FSM (different from business-logic 'rb-state-machine': here we look at the FSM definition itself, not the marker)
ruby.false_positive_notes: Stable marker. The transitions block defines invariants the skill should verify.

swift.description: URLSession delegate callbacks — async state machine (connect → response → data → complete)
swift.false_positive_notes: Audit error / cancellation handlers — partial-state on cancel is bug-prone.

swift.description: Stream-based I/O — chunk-by-chunk state machine, partial reads / EOF handling
Custom JSON decoding strategy — stateful per-key/value handler. Audit error paths.
swift.false_positive_notes: .custom strategies are often correct but error-prone for edge cases.

swift.description: XMLParser SAX delegate — event-driven XML state machine. Audit nesting depth limits + external entity refs.
swift.false_positive_notes: External entities default to OFF in NSXMLParser since iOS 4 but verify shouldResolveExternalEntities.

swift.description: Combine framework reactive stream — state transitions via Publishers chain
swift.false_positive_notes: Stable Combine markers. Audit cancellation + error propagation.

swift.description: SwiftUI navigation/state — view state machine with implicit transitions
swift.false_positive_notes: Audit deep-link → NavigationPath construction for path-injection.
